title: Kieren Pearson
text: Home * People * Kieren Pearson Kieren Pearson [1] Kieren Pearson , an Australian bachelor of actuarial studies and bachelor of commerce student at UNSW , self-employed mathematics tutor, and computer games and chess programmer. He is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Halogen [2] .
